name: VSCCrypto
summary: Contains basic c functions classes for creating key pairs, encrypting/decrypting data, signing data and verifying signatures.
prepare_command:
set -eu
SRC="Carthage/iOS"
OUT="XCFrameworks/iOS"
WORK=$(mktemp -d)
mkdir -p "$OUT"
for FW_PATH in "$SRC"/*.framework; do
  NAME=$(basename "$FW_PATH" .framework)
  BIN="$FW_PATH/$NAME"
  [ -f "$BIN" ] || continue
  DEV="$WORK/dev"; SIM="$WORK/sim"
  rm -rf "$DEV" "$SIM"; mkdir -p "$DEV" "$SIM"
  cp -R "$FW_PATH" "$DEV/"; cp -R "$FW_PATH" "$SIM/"
  lipo -thin arm64 "$BIN" -output "$DEV/$NAME.framework/$NAME"
  lipo -thin arm64 "$BIN" -output "$WORK/dev_arm64"
  lipo -thin x86_64 "$BIN" -output "$WORK/dev_x86_64"
  xcrun vtool -set-build-version 7 12.0 13.2 -replace -output "$WORK/sim_arm64" "$WORK/dev_arm64"
  xcrun vtool -set-build-version 7 12.0 13.2 -replace -output "$WORK/sim_x86_64" "$WORK/dev_x86_64"
  lipo -create "$WORK/sim_arm64" "$WORK/sim_x86_64" -output "$SIM/$NAME.framework/$NAME"
  rm -rf "$OUT/$NAME.xcframework"
  xcodebuild -create-xcframework -framework "$DEV/$NAME.framework" -framework "$SIM/$NAME.framework" -output "$OUT/$NAME.xcframework"
done
rm -rf "$WORK"
